repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 Theorem 2: binary one-pair principal-strata reduction

published_prior_art.cite: GilbertHudgens2008 defines CEP principal-stratum effects; KurokiCai2013 gives closed-form sharp surrogate-endpoint bounds
VanderWeele2013 and YinLiuGengLuo2019 already study criteria excluding surrogate paradoxes; this is a responder-stratum inclusion-side specialization
KurokiCai2013 sharp-bounds endpoint-attainment logic; GilbertHudgens2008 CEP principal-stratum target

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the gap cites ChenGengJia2007, VanderWeele2013, and YinLiuGengLuo2019 without section/equation/page anchors showing a published open frontier that T_R(P) strictly resolves.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The headline is an open-set endpoint-attainment claim over observed laws, not a named mathematical object beyond the already-defined interval endpoints.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: After Theorem 1, T_R(P)>0 iff L_{1R}-U_{0R}<0 is just the lower-endpoint sign of the identified interval; the positive-concordance clauses are observable assumptions, so the proof route has too little non-routine content for a flagship kernel.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add location-level anchors in ChenGengJia2007, VanderWeele2013, YinLiuGengLuo2019, and KurokiCai2013, then state exactly which theorem, criterion, or open gap T_R(P) strictly tightens.

Replace the interval-sign iff with a non-definitional flagship claim, such as a strict equivalence/non-equivalence frontier between the Yin-Liu-Geng-Luo observed-data exclusion criteria and the responder-stratum CEP sign region over an open class of binary tables.

For Conjecture 2, name and compute a genuine focal object beyond openness, for example an explicit maximal concordance-preserving witness polytope or a closed-form active-face certificate with dimension and facets.

recommended_next_step: Revise toward a comparator-anchored non-definitional flagship kernel, or downgrade the novelty target to field.
